---
title: "Home"
html:
    code-fold: true
---

<style>
.column p { margin: 4pt 0; }
.headshot-circle {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: block;
}
.projects-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 14pt;
  padding: 6px 16px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #555;
  border: 1px solid #bbb;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  background: transparent;
  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}
.projects-btn:hover {
  background: #f0f0f0;
  color: #333;
  text-decoration: none;
}
</style>

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="20%"}
![](headshot.png){.headshot-circle}
:::
::: {.column width="10%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::
::: {.column width="70%"}
Hi! My name is Katinka Lennemann. I'm a UCLA senior with a double major in Statistics & Data Science and Applied Mathematics. I'm passionate about data-driven change making for social impact, particularly for climate action and structural change.


<a href="projects.html" class="projects-btn">View My Projects</a>
:::
::::
